## Source: amazon-inspector (ae1479aa9ec70d315ba69eec145d02655fe633a7f253ba7b0b3d082895b1ca35)
The package security-install-analytics was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (96878282978dd7339d29278b0653335defbadba0ff8ea9ba049ccac334a88b9e)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'security-install-analytics' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
